name: extract_documents
description: Extract text and structured data from claim documents via OCR service

extraction_type.description: Type of extraction: 'raw' for plain text, 'fields' for key-value pairs, 'document' for full structure

file_path.description: Local path to the document file (required if file_url not provided)

file_url.description: URL to download the document from (required if file_path not provided)

prompt.description: Optional custom prompt to guide the extraction

fields.description: Specific fields to extract (optional, used with 'fields' extraction type)
